# Agent Error Catalog

| Error                                                     | Invariant                                                           | Docs                                                                 | Fix                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| --------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `agent_os.aead_sealed_codec_failure`                      | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [carriers-and-material.md](/concepts/carriers-and-material/)         | Seal live material through the owner AEAD codec, keep key material live, and reject malformed or mismatched sealed envelopes before opening.                                                                                                        |
| `agent_os.backend_protocol_parse_failure`                 | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [backend-protocol.md](/packages/backend-protocol/)                   | Decode backend protocol payloads at the protocol boundary and reject malformed external input before it reaches runtime logic.                                                                                                                      |
| `agent_os.boundary_commit_rejected`                       | `invariant.d10.namespace-integrity`, `invariant.d10.truth-identity` | [boundary-contract.md](/boundary-contract/)                          | Commit through the owning BoundaryContract with matching event vocabulary, scopeRef, effectAuthorityRef, and claim identity.                                                                                                                        |
| `agent_os.capability_rejected`                            | `invariant.d10.namespace-integrity`                                 | [boundary-contract.md](/boundary-contract/)                          | Register the extension capability that owns the event prefix before committing or dispatching the fact.                                                                                                                                             |
| `agent_os.cloudflare_worker_bundle_resolution_failure`    | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [deploy-cloudflare.md](/packages/deploy-cloudflare/)                 | Resolve Cloudflare worker bundle references before deploy composition and fail the provider boundary when the bundle cannot be located.                                                                                                             |
| `agent_os.cloudflare_worker_deploy_resolution_failure`    | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [deploy-cloudflare.md](/packages/deploy-cloudflare/)                 | Resolve deploy target bindings and provider configuration before emitting deploy facts.                                                                                                                                                             |
| `agent_os.dispatch_binding_ref_malformed`                 | `invariant.d10.truth-identity`                                      | [backend-cloudflare-do.md](/packages/backend-cloudflare-do/)         | Use a valid binding MaterialRef for dispatch targets and reject malformed target refs at the backend boundary.                                                                                                                                      |
| `agent_os.dispatch_payload_parse_failure`                 | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [backend-protocol.md](/packages/backend-protocol/)                   | Decode dispatch payloads through the backend protocol parser before committing inbound or outbound dispatch facts.                                                                                                                                  |
| `agent_os.dispatch_scope_mismatch`                        | `invariant.d10.truth-identity`                                      | [backend-cloudflare-do.md](/packages/backend-cloudflare-do/)         | Dispatch only to the exact target scopeRef and effectAuthorityRef; do not reuse a scope-wide derived key as truth.                                                                                                                                  |
| `agent_os.dispatch_target_not_found`                      | `invariant.d10.truth-identity`                                      | [backend-cloudflare-do.md](/packages/backend-cloudflare-do/)         | Register or resolve the dispatch target binding before enqueueing delivery.                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `agent_os.driver_ledger_commit_shape_mismatch`            | `invariant.ledger.single-commit-source`                             | [durable-truth.md](/concepts/durable-truth/)                         | Keep driver append actions backed by ledger commits that return exactly the requested events; treat mismatched commit shape as a backend ledger failure.                                                                                            |
| `agent_os.durable_trigger_acquire_cancelled`              | `invariant.ledger.single-commit-source`                             | [durable-process-algebra.md](/concepts/durable-process-algebra/)     | Keep trigger acquisition and cancellation in the durable trigger lifecycle contract so a claimed row always has a recoverable terminal path.                                                                                                        |
| `agent_os.durable_trigger_commit_returned_thenable`       | `invariant.ledger.single-commit-source`                             | [durable-process-algebra.md](/concepts/durable-process-algebra/)     | Keep trigger commit callbacks synchronous inside the backend transaction and move asynchronous work after durable commit.                                                                                                                           |
| `agent_os.durable_trigger_drain_limit_exceeded`           | `invariant.ledger.single-commit-source`                             | [durable-process-algebra.md](/concepts/durable-process-algebra/)     | Drain due work through the durable trigger scheduler with an explicit limit and retry the remaining due work later.                                                                                                                                 |
| `agent_os.dynamic_worker_failure`                         | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [dynamic-worker.md](/packages/dynamic-worker/)                       | Surface dynamic worker provider failures through the provider boundary instead of converting them into successful runtime output.                                                                                                                   |
| `agent_os.dynamic_worker_policy_denied`                   | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [dynamic-worker.md](/packages/dynamic-worker/)                       | Reject disallowed dynamic worker requests at policy evaluation before provider execution.                                                                                                                                                           |
| `agent_os.dynamic_worker_policy_violation`                | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [dynamic-worker.md](/packages/dynamic-worker/)                       | Move policy-violating dynamic worker input back to the caller boundary and require a valid provider policy.                                                                                                                                         |
| `agent_os.dynamic_worker_provider_failure`                | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [dynamic-worker.md](/packages/dynamic-worker/)                       | Classify provider failures at the dynamic worker adapter and keep product logic out of provider error parsing.                                                                                                                                      |
| `agent_os.effect_ai_aborted`                              | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [llm-transport-effect-ai.md](/packages/llm-transport-effect-ai/)     | Propagate Effect AI aborts through LlmTransport and let submit own terminal runtime facts.                                                                                                                                                          |
| `agent_os.effect_ai_json_encode_failed`                   | `invariant.algebra.single-code-source`                              | [llm-transport-effect-ai.md](/packages/llm-transport-effect-ai/)     | Encode structured provider payloads through the Effect AI transport adapter and fail before committing runtime evidence.                                                                                                                            |
| `agent_os.effect_ai_missing_usage`                        | `invariant.algebra.single-code-source`                              | [llm-transport-effect-ai.md](/packages/llm-transport-effect-ai/)     | Keep provider usage accounting in the LlmTransport output schema and reject responses that cannot produce runtime usage evidence.                                                                                                                   |
| `agent_os.effect_ai_prompt_error`                         | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [llm-transport-effect-ai.md](/packages/llm-transport-effect-ai/)     | Build prompts at the provider adapter boundary and surface prompt construction failures before submit records terminal facts.                                                                                                                       |
| `agent_os.effect_ai_provider_executed_tool_rejected`      | `invariant.algebra.single-code-source`                              | [llm-transport-effect-ai.md](/packages/llm-transport-effect-ai/)     | Disable provider-executed tool paths for agentOS tools; tool execution must flow through runtime admission and ledger settlement.                                                                                                                   |
| `agent_os.effect_ai_tool_handler_called`                  | `invariant.algebra.single-code-source`                              | [llm-transport-effect-ai.md](/packages/llm-transport-effect-ai/)     | Treat provider-side tool handler invocation as an adapter violation; runtime owns tool calls and settlements.                                                                                                                                       |
| `agent_os.effect_ai_unsupported_output_part`              | `invariant.algebra.single-code-source`                              | [llm-transport-effect-ai.md](/packages/llm-transport-effect-ai/)     | Map provider output parts through the runtime output-item algebra and reject parts without a runtime representation.                                                                                                                                |
| `agent_os.effect_ai_unsupported_route`                    | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [llm-transport-effect-ai.md](/packages/llm-transport-effect-ai/)     | Choose a route supported by the Effect AI transport adapter or add an explicit adapter branch for the provider.                                                                                                                                     |
| `agent_os.extension_capability_conflict`                  | `invariant.d10.namespace-integrity`                                 | [boundary-contract.md](/boundary-contract/)                          | Declare one owner for each extension capability and event namespace; remove duplicate capability declarations.                                                                                                                                      |
| `agent_os.image_resource_settlement_reconcile_required`   | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [image-resource-settlement.md](/packages/image-resource-settlement/) | Treat consume/release settlement failures as provider-local reconcile signals; callers that own a carrier boundary must translate them into indeterminate settlement facts.                                                                         |
| `agent_os.invalid_resource_amount`                        | `invariant.algebra.type-or-boot-proof`                              | [resource-carrier.md](/packages/resource-carrier/)                   | Reject non-positive or non-finite resource amounts before committing resource or quota facts.                                                                                                                                                       |
| `agent_os.invalid_schedule_at`                            | `invariant.ledger.single-commit-source`                             | [durable-process-algebra.md](/concepts/durable-process-algebra/)     | Schedule durable work with a valid future timestamp and keep scheduling inside the durable process contract.                                                                                                                                        |
| `agent_os.invalid_trace_context`                          | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [runtime.md](/packages/runtime/)                                     | Decode trace context at the runtime boundary and reject malformed trace metadata before provider or ledger projection consumes it.                                                                                                                  |
| `agent_os.json_stringify_error`                           | `invariant.ledger.single-commit-source`                             | [durable-truth.md](/concepts/durable-truth/)                         | Encode final payloads before commit side effects consume them; reject unstringifiable payloads before projection application.                                                                                                                       |
| `agent_os.legacy_ledger_schema`                           | `invariant.d10.truth-identity`                                      | [durable-truth.md](/concepts/durable-truth/)                         | Delete old local backend state and initialize the D10 schema; no legacy row migration is supported.                                                                                                                                                 |
| `agent_os.llm_call_timed_out`                             | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [runtime.md](/packages/runtime/)                                     | Propagate LLM call timeout through submit and commit a runtime-owned terminal abort fact.                                                                                                                                                           |
| `agent_os.llm_call_timeout`                               | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [runtime.md](/packages/runtime/)                                     | Use the timeout marker only as abort metadata and let runtime terminal events expose the durable failure.                                                                                                                                           |
| `agent_os.missing_submit_run_binding`                     | `invariant.d10.truth-identity`                                      | [runtime-protocol.md](/packages/runtime-protocol/)                   | Provide the framework-owned LLM route binding before lowering app-authored SubmitRunInput; adapters must not synthesize route defaults.                                                                                                             |
| `agent_os.postgres_harness_error`                         | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [backend-node-postgres.md](/packages/backend-node-postgres/)         | Start and clean up the runtime contract Postgres harness at the test boundary, mapping Docker, psql, and config failures into the harness error channel.                                                                                            |
| `agent_os.projection_application_error`                   | `invariant.d10.truth-identity`                                      | [materialized-projections.md](/concepts/materialized-projections/)   | Keep projection reducers pure and make malformed facts explicit failures rather than alternate truth.                                                                                                                                               |
| `agent_os.projection_definition_error`                    | `invariant.algebra.single-code-source`                              | [materialized-projections.md](/concepts/materialized-projections/)   | Declare projection identity and source provenance at the owning spec before the projection engine derives any view.                                                                                                                                 |
| `agent_os.projection_reducer_returned_thenable`           | `invariant.d10.truth-identity`                                      | [materialized-projections.md](/concepts/materialized-projections/)   | Move asynchronous work to the ledger writer or backend transaction hook; projection reducers must be synchronous.                                                                                                                                   |
| `agent_os.projection_registry_error`                      | `invariant.d10.truth-identity`                                      | [materialized-projections.md](/concepts/materialized-projections/)   | Build a projection registry with unique projection kinds and valid projection definitions.                                                                                                                                                          |
| `agent_os.projection_run_failed`                          | `invariant.algebra.single-code-source`                              | [materialized-projections.md](/concepts/materialized-projections/)   | Handle projection failures as fail-closed derivation failures instead of inventing fallback output.                                                                                                                                                 |
| `agent_os.projection_sink_failure`                        | `invariant.docs.agent-projection`                                   | [materialized-projections.md](/concepts/materialized-projections/)   | Keep sink read and write failures at the sink boundary; projection functions must stay pure source-to-view derivations.                                                                                                                             |
| `agent_os.projection_wait_timed_out`                      | `invariant.d10.truth-identity`                                      | [materialized-projections.md](/concepts/materialized-projections/)   | Wait on the ledger-derived projection with a bounded Effect retry policy, or commit the missing ledger fact before reading the projection.                                                                                                          |
| `agent_os.provider_http_failure`                          | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [agent-schema.md](/concepts/agent-schema/)                           | Handle provider transport failures at the LLM transport boundary and let submit record the runtime terminal fact.                                                                                                                                   |
| `agent_os.provider_output_decode_error`                   | `invariant.algebra.single-code-source`                              | [agent-schema.md](/concepts/agent-schema/)                           | Decode provider output through the runtime output-item schema instead of product-side fallback parsing.                                                                                                                                             |
| `agent_os.ref_resolution_failed`                          | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [carriers-and-material.md](/concepts/carriers-and-material/)         | Resolve symbolic material refs at the adapter boundary and fail closed when a required ref cannot be resolved.                                                                                                                                      |
| `agent_os.resource_insufficient`                          | `invariant.ledger.single-commit-source`                             | [resource-carrier.md](/packages/resource-carrier/)                   | Grant or release resources through the resource ledger before attempting a reservation that would exceed available capacity.                                                                                                                        |
| `agent_os.resource_reservation_closed`                    | `invariant.ledger.single-commit-source`                             | [resource-carrier.md](/packages/resource-carrier/)                   | Do not consume or release a reservation after its terminal resource fact has already been committed.                                                                                                                                                |
| `agent_os.resource_reservation_not_found`                 | `invariant.ledger.single-commit-source`                             | [resource-carrier.md](/packages/resource-carrier/)                   | Commit or look up the resource reservation under the exact ledger identity before consuming or releasing it.                                                                                                                                        |
| `agent_os.runtime_ledger_transition_rejected`             | `invariant.ledger.single-commit-source`                             | [durable-truth.md](/concepts/durable-truth/)                         | Commit runtime events in an order that satisfies runtime transition laws; referenced runtime source events must already exist and match the expected kind and turn.                                                                                 |
| `agent_os.runtime_storage_error`                          | `invariant.ledger.single-commit-source`                             | [durable-truth.md](/concepts/durable-truth/)                         | Map backend storage failures into the runtime-owned storage error at the runtime service boundary; keep backend-specific storage errors inside backend adapters.                                                                                    |
| `agent_os.sandbox_failure`                                | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [sandbox.md](/packages/sandbox/)                                     | Classify sandbox provider failures at the sandbox execution-domain adapter and return a closed tool result.                                                                                                                                         |
| `agent_os.sandbox_policy_denied`                          | `invariant.algebra.type-or-boot-proof`                              | [sandbox.md](/packages/sandbox/)                                     | Reject sandbox requests that violate the declared sandbox policy before provider execution.                                                                                                                                                         |
| `agent_os.scope_missing`                                  | `invariant.d10.truth-identity`                                      | [durable-truth.md](/concepts/durable-truth/)                         | Resolve the structured scopeRef before runtime or backend operations; do not fall back to an implicit scope.                                                                                                                                        |
| `agent_os.sql_error`                                      | `invariant.ledger.single-commit-source`                             | [durable-truth.md](/concepts/durable-truth/)                         | Keep SQL writes inside the backend-owned ledger commit primitive and return typed SqlError at the backend boundary.                                                                                                                                 |
| `agent_os.stream_identity_error`                          | `invariant.d10.truth-identity`                                      | [backend-cloudflare-do.md](/packages/backend-cloudflare-do/)         | Stream only with an exact scopeRef and effectAuthorityRef identity and reject malformed stream identity input.                                                                                                                                      |
| `agent_os.tenant_credential_resolver_configuration_error` | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [tenant-material.md](/packages/tenant-material/)                     | Configure tenant credential resolution before binding provider credentials to material refs.                                                                                                                                                        |
| `agent_os.trigger_factory_error`                          | `invariant.ledger.single-commit-source`                             | [durable-process-algebra.md](/concepts/durable-process-algebra/)     | Keep durable trigger factory output synchronous, typed, and registered before scheduling or claiming trigger work.                                                                                                                                  |
| `agent_os.unregistered_durable_trigger_kind`              | `invariant.ledger.single-commit-source`                             | [durable-process-algebra.md](/concepts/durable-process-algebra/)     | Register the durable trigger kind before scheduling, claiming, or dispatching due work.                                                                                                                                                             |
| `agent_os.unregistered_projection_kind`                   | `invariant.d10.truth-identity`                                      | [materialized-projections.md](/concepts/materialized-projections/)   | Register the projection definition before reading, status-checking, or rebuilding that projection kind.                                                                                                                                             |
| `agent_os.unsupported_scope_ref`                          | `invariant.d10.truth-identity`                                      | [durable-truth.md](/concepts/durable-truth/)                         | Use a backend-supported scopeRef kind or add an explicit backend adapter branch for that scope kind.                                                                                                                                                |
| `agent_os.witness_port_rejected`                          | `invariant.boundary.runtime-validation-external-only`               | [boundary-contract.md](/boundary-contract/)                          | Resolve provider witness state into a symbolic IndeterminateRef only; settle and commit it through the owning SettlementContract and BoundaryEvents path.                                                                                           |
| `agent_os.workspace_job_candidate_missing`                | `invariant.workspace-job.verified-terminal`                         | [workspace-job.md](/packages/workspace-job/)                         | Treat a missing candidate as a workspace_job.failed terminal fact before finalization or verification can produce a deliverable.                                                                                                                    |
| `agent_os.workspace_job_data_plane_failed`                | `invariant.workspace-job.verified-terminal`                         | [workspace-job.md](/packages/workspace-job/)                         | Keep seed and terminal build/write/read failures inside the workspace job data-plane boundary; retryable witness gaps settle through workspace_job.reconcile_required while non-retryable finalization defects settle through workspace_job.failed. |
| `agent_os.workspace_job_run_id_mismatch`                  | `invariant.workspace-job.verified-terminal`                         | [workspace-job.md](/packages/workspace-job/)                         | Reject terminal builder output whose run id does not match the requested workspace job before verifier checks can mark it deliverable.                                                                                                              |
| `agent_os.workspace_job_verifier_failed`                  | `invariant.workspace-job.verified-terminal`                         | [workspace-job.md](/packages/workspace-job/)                         | Map verifier exceptions to workspace_job.reconcile_required; reserve verifier_rejected for successful product-domain verifier verdicts.                                                                                                             |
